caption: A group of men wearing grey athletic gear, including polo shirts and pants, walk together outdoors past manicured hedges and a white architectural structure. The Real Madrid club crest is visible in the upper right corner. The scene transitions to an exterior view of a stadium building with a red fence, where the on-screen text "NUEVO LOS CÁRMENES 20:43" appears. The view then shifts to a wide shot of the stadium's interior, showing empty red seats and a green grass pitch under bright floodlights, with the word "GRANADA" visible on the stands. Finally, the men in grey athletic wear are seen walking through a concrete tunnel toward the pitch, accompanied by staff members, including one man wearing a bright yellow high-visibility vest. One man in the group is seen interacting with another as they move toward the field.
